name: Nacre
description: Translucent refractive mother-of-pearl cell-field — a faithful port of the Milkdrop preset `$$$ Royal - Mashup (431)`'s jello-mirror character (drifting overlapping lens-cells, chromatic-fringed rims, pulsing central core, slow palette rotation) on Phosphene's mv_warp, substantially uplifted with 2026 capabilities: stem-instrument routing (vocals→core, bass→swell/kick, drums→rim sparkle, harmonic other→iridescence shift), real thin-film iridescence on the rims (vs the original's 2-px chromatic hack), and smooth-Voronoi refractive cells, on HDR float feedback. See docs/presets/NACRE_PLAN.md.
author: Matt
